name: Engaged
overview: The series follows "Love Seekers" who enter a luxurious villa. While the goal is to find a soulmate for an official Roka (engagement), the path is filled with Dhoka (betrayal). Contestants are often tempted by new "Love Makers" (wild cards) who enter specifically to break existing bonds and test the strength of their "Engaged" status.

trailers.title: New Show - Engaged [ Roka Ya Dhoka ] Uorfi Javed | @Harshgujral | Feb 14 | DisneyPlus Hotstar
